trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in the ErrImageNeverPull status, which means the image specified in the pod spec cannot be pulled.The pod is failing to pull the image "incorrect-selector-app:latest". The pull policy is set to "Never", which means it will never attempt to pull the image and always use the local cache. Since the local cache does not have this image, the pod is stuck in the ErrImageNeverPull state.The patch command updates the pod template to use the "nginx:latest" image instead of the incorrect "incorrect-selector-app:latest" image. This should resolve the ErrImageNeverPull issue.

FIX COMPLETE
